text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 191 

PRVDR_NUM_SPCL_UNIT_CD 

LABEL: Provider Number Special Unit Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code identifying the special numbering system for units of hospitals that are excluded from the 
prospective payment system (PPS) or hospitals with skilled nursing facility (SNF) swing-bed designation. 

SHORT NAME: SPCLUNIT 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM_SPCL_UNIT_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: M
